What is S M I D

A Smarter
Digital World

S M I D — Social Media Identification — is a technology concept built to create a smarter, safer, and more meaningful digital environment across all platforms.

The S M I D framework introduces a structured identity layer that recognises different user groups — teenagers, adults, and businesses — to ensure each group has the right protections, tools, and experiences online.

Together, we will change the narrative of social media.

Core Categories
3
Phases Planned
∞
User Groups Served
1
Bold Vision

The S M I D Framework

Four Categories.
One System.

T S M I D
TS
Teenage Social Media Identification
A dedicated safety and identity layer for teenagers navigating social platforms — promoting awareness, protection, and healthy digital habits.
01
T A S M I D
TAS
Teenage & Adult Social Media Identification
Bridging youth and adult digital experiences with shared frameworks that promote cross-generational safety standards.
02
A S M I D
AS
Adult Social Media Identification
Structured identification for adult users enabling greater trust, accountability, and meaningful engagement online.
03
B S M I D
BS
Business Social Media Identification
An identity layer for businesses to operate with credibility, transparency, and structured engagement in digital communities.
04
S M I D • HUMAN PRESENCE SYSTEM

The Roadmap

Research & Concept Development

Prototype Building

Currently building expertise in coding, AI tools, product design, and digital innovation — with a clear vision to grow S M I D from an idea into a global technology project.
